title: matricaria chamomilla var. pusilla
intro: Matricaria chamomilla var. pusilla, also known as Dwarf Chamomile or Low Chamomile, is a small, compact species of the Matricaria chamomilla plant, belonging to the daisy family and native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, soothing digestive issues, and reducing anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Matricaria chamomile var. pusilla include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopausal hot flashes. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
